narrative:
Franklin Township B (precinct in Clermont County) has 468 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.2 percentage points.
